overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a character walking along the Del Perro beachfront promenade at sunset. The character explores a parking lot and residential area adjacent to the beach before returning to the promenade, with the iconic pier, Ferris wheel, and downtown skyline visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with blue construction fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the beachfront promenade with the ocean to the right

notable_agents.action: person sitting on white bench facing the ocean

entered.detail: tall blue tarp construction barrier running along the left side of the walkway
sandy beach area sloping down to the water
calm ocean water reflecting the sunset sky
large amusement pier with buildings and Ferris wheel extending into the ocean
ornate black dual-lamp street post with glowing lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete beachfront promenade at sunset, with a blue construction fence on the left and the ocean beach on the right. The Del Perro Pier with its Ferris wheel is visible in the distance, and a person sits on a bench facing the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachside parking lot with residential house

events.description: turns left off the promenade into the asphalt parking lot
turns around near the house to head back toward the promenade

agents.ego_description: walking through the parking lot to observe the two-story house and surrounding area

entered.detail: white and brown two-story house with balcony and illuminated windows
elevated highway with moving traffic visible behind the parking lot
tall modern skyscrapers visible in the distance against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a wide asphalt parking lot, leaving the beach behind. A prominent two-story craftsman house with illuminated windows stands on the left, while the downtown skyline and highway overpass are visible in the background. The character explores the area near the house before turning back.

events.description: returns to the beachfront promenade from the parking lot
pedestrian in dark clothing passes close to the camera, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking along the promenade passing other pedestrians and street lamps

notable_agents.action: man in dark jacket and jeans walking toward the camera
person walking along the blue fence in the same direction as camera

entered.detail: blue construction barrier reappears on the left side
sandy beach and ocean visible again to the right
amusement pier with Ferris wheel becomes visible again ahead

segments.scene_description: Returning to the beachfront promenade, the character continues walking toward the Del Perro Pier as the sky darkens to deeper orange and purple hues. The character passes several pedestrians walking in the opposite direction, including one who passes very close to the camera, while the blue construction fence lines the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking lot with yellow bollards near amusement pier

events.description: turns right off the promenade into a parking lot with yellow bollards

agents.ego_description: turning right into the parking lot area near the pier

notable_agents.action: man in brown shirt walking through the parking lot

entered.detail: short yellow posts marking parking spaces and walkways
several parked vehicles in the lot near the pier
colorful buildings and rides of the amusement park on the pier

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a paved parking lot marked with yellow bollards, leaving the blue fence behind. Parked cars line the right side while the colorful lights and structures of the Del Perro amusement pier are visible ahead in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal promenade that shifts from a sunset beach walk into a residential exploration before returning toward the glowing lights of an amusement pier. It begins on a concrete walkway bordered by a blue construction fence and the ocean, with the distant Ferris wheel silhouetted against the sunset. As the camera turns left, the beach recedes and the scene opens into a wide asphalt parking lot featuring a two-story craftsman house with illuminated windows and the downtown skyline in the background. The movement then pivots back toward the promenade, where the sky deepens into orange and purple hues and pedestrians pass by as the camera continues its forward trajectory. Finally, the view shifts right into a paved lot marked by yellow bollards and parked cars, leaving the construction fence behind to face the colorful lights of the Del Perro Pier.
